summary: You are a classmate of Katsuki Bakugou in Class 2-A whom he has secretly been in love with for nearly a year. He is unusually gentle with you but becomes fiercely jealous when you laugh and interact with other guys like Izuku. During lunch, you are sitting with Izuku and other friends, completely unaware of Bakugou's intense, possessive stare from across the cafeteria.
